title: US to probe petrol price gouging claims, Trump says
summary: Trump's administration will investigate allegations of oil price manipulation as global crude prices have dropped but remain elevated following regional conflict.
content: The presidents remarks come as global oil prices have fallen but remain higher than before teh Iran war.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国将调查汽油价格欺诈指控
zh.summary: 特朗普政府将调查石油价格操纵指控，因为全球原油价格已下降但在地区冲突后仍保持高位。

title: Defense giant KNDS plans IPO in Paris and Frankfurt
summary: German defense contractor KNDS plans to list shares on Paris and Frankfurt exchanges, with existing shareholders expected to divest up to 20% of their holdings.
content: KNDS plans to list shares in Paris and Frankfurt, with current shareholders expected to sell up to 20% of existing share capital.

zh.title: 防务巨头KNDS计划在巴黎和法兰克福上市
zh.summary: 德国防务承包商KNDS计划在巴黎和法兰克福交易所上市，现有股东预计将减持其持股的20%。

title: Morgan Stanley doubles China humanoid robot shipment forecast as commercialization accelerates
summary: Morgan Stanley significantly increased its forecast for China's humanoid robotics market as manufacturers accelerate real-world commercial deployments.
content: Morgan Stanley has sharply raised its outlook for China's humanoid robotics market, as early commercial deployment in real-world scenarios accelerated.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利翻倍中国人形机器人出货预测，商业化加速
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利大幅上调了对中国人形机器人市场的预测，因为制造商加快推进实际商业部署。

title: Asia tech stocks rebound after global rout; Samsung jumps 9%
summary: Asian technology stocks rebounded Wednesday following a global selloff, with Samsung surging 9% amid volatile trading conditions.
content: Asia's technology stocks mostly rebounded on Wednesday amid choppy trading following a global selloff in the previous session.

zh.title: 亚洲科技股在全球暴跌后反弹;三星飙升9%
zh.summary: 亚洲科技股在全球抛售后的周三反弹,三星在波动的交易条件中飙升9%。

title: Oil extends decline as Trump accuses oil firms of 'gouging' consumers
summary: President Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following recent declines in crude oil costs.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.

zh.title: 特朗普指责油企"宰客"之际,油价继续下跌
zh.summary: 特朗普总统加强了对石油公司的压力,要求他们在原油成本最近下降后降低汽油价格。

title: Burnham likely to replace Reeves if he becomes PM
summary: Andy Burnham is expected to offer Rachel Reeves a junior cabinet position if he becomes prime minister, marking a significant demotion.
content: Rachel Reeves would be offered a more junior cabinet role, the BBC understands.

zh.title: 如果伯纳姆成为首相,他可能会取代里夫斯
zh.summary: 如果伯纳姆成为首相,他预计会向瑞秋·里夫斯提供一个初级内阁职位,这标志着一次重大降职。

title: Ukraine is raising the cost of war for Russia — and testing Putin's resolve
summary: Ukraine's recent political and military victories, including successful deep-strike operations, have strengthened national confidence during the ongoing war with Russia.
content: A string of political victories and deep-strike successes has bolstered confidence in Ukraine amid its long-running war with Russia.

zh.title: 乌克兰正在提高俄罗斯战争成本——并考验普京的决心
zh.summary: 乌克兰最近取得的政治和军事胜利，包括成功的深度打击行动，在与俄罗斯的持续战争中加强了民族信心。

title: Three New York Democrats backed by Mamdani win House seat primaries; 2 incumbents lose
summary: Three Democratic Socialist-backed candidates won New York House primary races, with two incumbents defeated a year after the DSA's mayoral victory.
content: Two candidates backed by the Democratic Socialist of America won their primaries, a year after the DSA-backed Zohran Mamdani won New York mayor's race.

zh.title: 三位获得马姆达尼支持的纽约民主党人赢得众议院初选；2名现任议员落败
zh.summary: 三名民主社会主义支持的候选人赢得了纽约众议院初选，在民主社会主义组织市长选举胜利一年后，两名现任议员被击败。

title: VIX owner Cboe jumps into prediction markets to build on zero-day options growth
summary: Cboe, operator of the VIX volatility index, launched prediction markets to capitalize on surging demand in the fast-growing sector.
content: Global markets operator Cboe has launched its first prediction markets products to meet consumer demand in the fast growing sector.

zh.title: VIX所有者Cboe进入预测市场以扩展零日期权增长
zh.summary: VIX波动率指数的运营商Cboe推出了预测市场，以利用快速增长部门中不断增加的需求。

title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
summary: Alphabet joins the Dow Jones Industrial Average as Verizon exits, reflecting technology's expanding influence in the premier index.
content: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

zh.title: 字母表加入道琼斯工业平均指数，取代威瑞森
zh.summary: 字母表加入道琼斯工业平均指数，而威瑞森退出，反映了科技在这个顶级指数中影响力的扩大。

title: Anthropic’s Mythos model found vulnerabilities in classified U.S. government systems, official says: AP
summary: Anthropic's Mythos AI model successfully identified security vulnerabilities in classified U.S. government computer systems during a testing exercise, according to a U.S. official. This demonstrates the model's capability in cybersecurity testing and highlights AI's potential to find weaknesses in highly secure systems. The achievement underscores both the promise and risk considerations around deploying advanced AI for national security purposes.
content: A U.S. official told The Associated Press on Tuesday that one of Anthropic's artificial intelligence models had identified vulnerabilities in highly sensitive and secure U.S. government computer systems during a testing exercise.

zh.title: 官员表示：Anthropic的Mythos模型在美国机密政府系统中发现漏洞
zh.summary: 根据美国官员称，Anthropic的Mythos AI模型在一次测试演习中成功识别了美国机密政府计算机系统中的安全漏洞。这展示了该模型在网络安全测试中的能力，并突出了AI在发现高度安全系统中弱点的潜力。这一成就既强调了将先进AI用于国家安全的前景，也凸显了相关的风险考虑。

title: Who could be the UK's next chancellor?
summary: Following the UK prime minister's resignation, the race is underway to select the next chancellor, the country's chief financial officer. The successor will shape Britain's economic policy during a period of fiscal uncertainty and must address priorities including tax policy, spending, and inflation management. The selection carries significant weight for markets and the broader British economy.
content: The prime minister's resignation has fired the starting gun on the race to be in charge of the UK's finances.

zh.title: 谁可能成为英国的下一任财政大臣？
zh.summary: 在英国首相辞职后，选择下一任财政大臣的竞争已经开始。作为该国的首席财务官，继任者将在财政不确定时期制定英国经济政策，并必须应对包括税收政策、支出和通胀管理在内的优先事项。这一选择对市场和整个英国经济有重大影响。

title: Stock futures steady ahead of Micron earnings as traders debate how far tech sell-off will go, Kospi jumps over 3%: Live updates
summary: Tech stocks experienced a broad sell-off on Tuesday, with chipmakers like Micron suffering significant losses that dragged down the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite. Traders are focused on Micron's upcoming earnings as a potential indicator of whether the tech downturn will continue or stabilize. South Korea's Kospi bucked the trend with a 3% gain, showing regional variations in sentiment.
content: A rout in chipmaker names, including Micron, weighed on the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite on Tuesday.

zh.title: 股指期货在美光财报前保持稳定，交易员争论科技股抛售将走多远，韩国综合指数跳涨超3%
zh.summary: 周二科技股经历了广泛抛售，包括美光等芯片制造商遭遇重大损失，拖累了标普500指数和纳斯达克综合指数。交易员关注美光即将发布的财报，作为判断科技股下滑是否会继续或稳定的潜在指标。韩国综合指数逆势上涨超3%，显示了不同地区市场情绪的差异。

title: The No. 1 NBA draft pick will make nearly $70 million as TV deals keep money flowing into the NBA
summary: The top NBA draft pick is set to earn nearly $70 million as television money continues flowing into professional basketball through lucrative media deals. Draft positioning has become critically important financially, with players falling just a few slots potentially losing tens of millions in career earnings. This concentration of wealth underscores the significant financial leverage that early draft position provides.
content: There’s so much money at stake in the NBA draft that falling a few slots could cost a player $30 million.

zh.title: NBA选秀状元将通过电视转播权协议获得近7000万美元
zh.summary: NBA首轮选秀状元将获得近7000万美元，因为电视转播权协议继续为职业篮球带来大量资金。选秀顺位在财务上变得至关重要，球员仅下滑几个位置就可能失去数千万美元的职业生涯收入。这种财富集中突出了早期选秀顺位提供的巨大财务杠杆作用。

title: Alphabet’s stock is set to join the Dow, pivoting index’s industrial roots toward tech
summary: Alphabet (Google's parent company) is being added to the Dow Jones Industrial Average, marking a significant shift in the index's composition toward technology companies. The company's massive investments in data center infrastructure—funded through increased borrowing—align it more closely with traditional industrial businesses. This inclusion reflects the changing nature of what constitutes "industrial" enterprise in the digital economy.
content: As Alphabet rolls out more data centers — and borrowing money to do it — it can be argued that it is becoming more of an industrial company, says strategist

zh.title: Alphabet股票将加入道琼斯指数，推动指数的工业根基向科技转变
zh.summary: Alphabet（谷歌母公司）被纳入道琼斯工业平均指数，标志着该指数成分向科技公司的重大转变。该公司在数据中心基础设施上的大规模投资——通过增加借贷资金——使其与传统工业企业更加一致。这一纳入反映了在数字经济中"工业"企业特征的变化。

title: Cerebras delivers its first earnings report — but it’s not enough to lift the stock
summary: AI chip maker Cerebras reported strong revenue figures in its first earnings results, yet the stock declined in after-hours trading, suggesting investor skepticism about profitability or growth prospects. The market's lukewarm response despite positive financials indicates heightened caution in the AI hardware sector. The performance highlights how strong revenue alone may not drive stock gains amid broader market volatility.
content: Despite upbeat revenue figures, Cerebras’s stock was falling in after-hours trading.

zh.title: Cerebras发布首份财报——但不足以推动股价上涨
zh.summary: AI芯片制造商Cerebras在首次财报中报告了强劲的收入数字，但股票在盘后交易中下跌，表明投资者对盈利能力或增长前景持怀疑态度。尽管财务数据积极，市场反应冷淡表明AI硬件部门谨慎态度提高。这一表现突出了在更广泛的市场波动中，仅靠强劲收入可能无法推动股价上涨。

title: MSCI keeps South Korea as emerging market, delays Indonesia review amid downgrade risk
summary: MSCI maintained South Korea's classification as an emerging market rather than upgrading it to developed market status, while deferring Indonesia's review amid downgrade risk. Korea's continued emerging market status comes despite investor hopes for inclusion in MSCI's more prestigious Developed Markets classification. This decision significantly affects capital flows and investment strategies for institutional investors.
content: The review comes amid hopes that Seoul could be included in MSCI's Developed Markets watchlist.

zh.title: MSCI将韩国维持为新兴市场，推迟印尼审查以规避降级风险
zh.summary: MSCI维持了韩国作为新兴市场的分类，而非将其升级为发达市场地位，同时推迟了印尼的审查以应对降级风险。韩国继续保持新兴市场地位，尽管投资者希望纳入MSCI更高级的发达市场分类。这一决定对机构投资者的资本流动和投资策略产生重大影响。
